headline: Today's top AI story: Open Source Extraction Service
bullets: Sources: Kimi developer Moonshot told investors it is preparing for a Hong Kong IPO in as early as six months; its ARR hit $300M in June, up from $200M in April (Bloomberg)
Open-weight models now match frontier cyber performance from just four months ago at a fraction of the cost
Update now: 7-Zip fixes RCE flaw exploitable with malicious archives
